message:
fix: remove unused imports, unnecessary clone, and fix next_cursor borrow issue

Cleanup across six files:
- command_transport.rs: remove unused AgentLifecycleState import
- connector_reliability.rs: move ConnectorActionKind import into #[cfg(test)]
  module where it's actually used, remove from non-test scope
- resize_scheduler.rs: remove unused ResizeViolationKind import
- tui/views.rs: remove unnecessary .clone() on circuit_style (Style is Copy)
- web/router.rs: use RequestSpanLogger (unit struct) directly instead of
  RequestSpanLogger::default()
- main.rs: compute next_cursor before consuming the events iterator, fixing a
  potential borrow-after-move issue where events.last() was called after the
  iterator had been partially consumed by the items loop

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
